english translation text: In the name of Allah the Beneficent, the Merciful.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

arabic text: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ فِيمَا تَقْضِي وَ تُقَدِّرُ مِنَ الْأَمْرِ الْمَحْتُومِ‏
english translation text: O Allah, let it be that when You decree and ordain from the matters which are certain,

arabic text: وَ فِيمَا تَفْرُقُ مِنَ الْأَمْرِ الْحَكِيمِ فِي لَيْلَةِ الْقَدْرِ
english translation text: that when You distinguish in the matters which are wise on the night of Qadr,

arabic text: وَ فِي الْقَضَاءِ الَّذِي لاَ يُرَدُّ وَ لاَ يُبَدَّلُ
english translation text: in the decree which cannot be reversed nor changed,

arabic text: أَنْ تَكْتُبَنِي مِنْ حُجَّاجِ بَيْتِكَ الْحَرَامِ
english translation text: that You write me amongst those who will go for pilgrimage (hajj) to Your holy house,

whose hajj is approved,
whose efforts are appreciated,
whose sins are forgiven, whose evil deeds have been pardoned.

arabic text: وَ اجْعَلْ فِيمَا تَقْضِي وَ تُقَدِّرُ
english translation text: And from what You decree and ordain,

arabic text: أَنْ تُطِيلَ عُمْرِي وَ تُوَسِّعَ عَلَيَّ فِي رِزْقِي وَ تَفْعَلَ بِي ...
english translation text:
let my life be lengthened,
and increase my sustenance, and . . .
